title: Validate Bead Priority End-To-End
description: Add and run targeted regression coverage for model compatibility, CLI priority mutation/display behavior, and scheduler prioritization within the eligible pool.
acceptance_criteria: Automated tests cover backward-compatible deserialization of beads without a priority field.
Automated tests cover CLI create/set-priority success paths, invalid priority rejection, and show/list display behavior.
Automated tests cover scheduler selection preferring eligible high-priority beads over earlier normal-priority beads.
Test execution results are recorded with any gaps or follow-up defects called out explicitly.
conflict_risks:
None. Only `models.py` was modified; no overlap with sibling beads targeting CLI or scheduler files.
No file-scope conflicts with sibling beads; only `scheduler/core.py` and the core test file were modified.
None — changes are additive (new parser arguments, new subcommand, new optional `create_bead` parameter with default `None`). Existing callers are unaffected.
The PRIORITY column is inserted between TYPE and TITLE in LIST_PLAIN_COLUMNS. Any test that checks column order positionally (e.g. by split index) may need updating. The existing test at :309 checks headers by substring presence, so it is safe — but verify no other test relies on column position.
